title: elaphoglossum jaliscanum
intro: Elaphoglossum jaliscanum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum jaliscanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Elaphoglossum jaliscanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications, making it a versatile and accessible remedy.
